name: Acoramidis
summary: High-affinity transthyretin stabilizer with randomized ATTR-CM evidence on a mortality, morbidity, biomarker, and function hierarchy.
mechanism_summary: Stabilizes TTR tetramers to inhibit dissociation and new amyloid formation rather than directly clearing existing deposits.

open_questions: Whether TTR stabilization changes aggregate burden or mainly slows additional deposition
How the hierarchical endpoint should be interpreted for broader proteostasis claims
